attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT TMP.B2B_MESSAGE_ID	,
TMP.MESSAGE_PRIORITY	,
TMP.PARTNER_NAME	,
TMP.STATUS_DATE	,
TMP.ORDER_NUMBER	,
TMP.SHIP_SET_NUMBER	,
TMP.ORIGIN_AIRPORT_CODE	,
TMP.DESTINATION_AIRPORT_CODE	,
TMP.DELIVERY_ID	,
TMP.COUNTRY_EXP_IMP	,
TMP.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE	,
TMP.STATUS_MET_DATE	,
TMP.STATUS_CODE	,
TMP.CITY_NAME	,
TMP.COUNTRY_NAME	,
TMP.STATE_NAME	,
TMP.MASTER_AIRWAY_BILL	,
TMP.HOUSE_AIRWAY_BILL	,
TMP.CARRIER_REFERENCE	,
TMP.FLIGHT_NUMBER	,
TMP.NUMBER_OF_PIECES	,
TMP.RECORD_STATUS	,
TMP.ERROR_MESSAGE	,
TMP.CREATED_BY	,
TMP.CREATION_DATE	,
TMP.LAST_UPDATED_BY	,
TMP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE	,
TMP.CONCURRENT_PROGRAM_REQUEST	,
TMP.ID	,
TMP.RRN_EXISTS_FLAG	,
TMP.DOMAIN_NAME	,
TMP.OTM_INTERFACE_STATUS	,
TMP.RETRY_COUNT	,
TMP.OTM_TRANSMISSION_NUMBER	,
TMP.OTM_TRANSMISSION_ERRORS	,
TMP.NOTIFIED_TO_CARRIER	,
TMP.COUNTER_VALUE	,
TMP.SEQUENCE_STATUS	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE1	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE2	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE3	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE4	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE5	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE6	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE7	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE8	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE9	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE10	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE11	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE12	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE13	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE14	,
TMP.ATTRIBUTE15	,
'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME,
TMP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
TMP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME ,
TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 (SELECT B2B_MESSAGE_ID	,
MESSAGE_PRIORITY	,
PARTNER_NAME	,
STATUS_DATE	,
ORDER_NUMBER	,
SHIP_SET_NUMBER	,
ORIGIN_AIRPORT_CODE	,
DESTINATION_AIRPORT_CODE	,
DELIVERY_ID	,
COUNTRY_EXP_IMP	,
EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE	,
STATUS_MET_DATE	,
STATUS_CODE	,
CITY_NAME	,
COUNTRY_NAME	,
STATE_NAME	,
MASTER_AIRWAY_BILL	,
HOUSE_AIRWAY_BILL	,
CARRIER_REFERENCE	,
FLIGHT_NUMBER	,
NUMBER_OF_PIECES	,
RECORD_STATUS	,
ERROR_MESSAGE	,
CREATED_BY	,
CREATION_DATE	,
LAST_UPDATED_BY	,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE	,
CONCURRENT_PROGRAM_REQUEST	,
ID	,
RRN_EXISTS_FLAG	,
DOMAIN_NAME	,
OTM_INTERFACE_STATUS	,
RETRY_COUNT	,
OTM_TRANSMISSION_NUMBER	,
OTM_TRANSMISSION_ERRORS	,
NOTIFIED_TO_CARRIER	,
COUNTER_VALUE	,
SEQUENCE_STATUS	,
ATTRIBUTE1	,
ATTRIBUTE2	,
ATTRIBUTE3	,
ATTRIBUTE4	,
ATTRIBUTE5	,
ATTRIBUTE6	,
ATTRIBUTE7	,
ATTRIBUTE8	,
ATTRIBUTE9	,
ATTRIBUTE10	,
ATTRIBUTE11	,
ATTRIBUTE12	,
ATTRIBUTE13	,
ATTRIBUTE14	,
ATTRIBUTE15	,
SOURCE_DML_TYPE, TRAIL_FILE_NAME,SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_X_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_HD_IFC
WHERE  SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <=  '$$EndLastExtractDate' AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE<>'DELETE' 
AND COALESCE(ATTRIBUTE2,'123')  NOT LIKE '11i%' 
AND STATUS_CODE IS NOT NULL ) TMP

QUALIFY RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY TMP.ORDER_NUMBER,TMP.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,TMP.STATUS_CODE,TMP.ORIGIN_AIRPORT_CODE,TMP.DESTINATION_AIRPORT_CODE   ORDER BY TMP.ORDER_NUMBER,TMP.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,TMP.STATUS_CODE,TMP.ORIGIN_AIRPORT_CODE,TMP.DESTINATION_AIRPORT_CODE, TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC ) = 1
